info.description: Filtered OpenAPI description for the stateless synchronous Alibaba Cloud Video Enhancement proxy. The gateway serves only the allowlisted operations defined in the paired YAML manifest.
info.title: Alibaba Cloud Video Enhancement API

post.description: This topic describes the syntax and examples of the AdjustVideoColor API for video color grading. The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=AdjustVideoColor and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

Mode.description: Specifies the rendering intent pattern. The default value is LogC. For details, see the rendering intent pattern description.

VideoBitrate.description: The output video bitrate, in Mbit/s. Default value: 20 Mbit/s. Valid range: `[8, 200]`.

VideoCodec.description: The output video encoding format. Valid values are h264, hevc, and prores. Default value: h264.

VideoFormat.description: The output video format. Valid values are mp4 and mov. Default value: mp4.

VideoUrl.description: The video URL. We recommend using an OSS link in the China (Shanghai) region. If your file is stored locally or in an OSS bucket outside the China (Shanghai) region, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).

Data.description: The content of the returned result data. This data is obtained only after the asynchronous task succeeds, by invoking the [GetAsyncJobResult](~~607824~~) API and performing JSON deserialization on its Result field.

VideoUrl.description:
The URL of the rendered video.  
> This URL is temporary and has a validity period of 30 minutes. After expiration, it can no longer be accessed. If you need to store the file for a longer duration or permanently, access the URL and download the file within 30 minutes, then save it to your own OSS bucket or another storage space.

Message.description: A prompt message returned after submitting an asynchronous task.
Message.example: 该调用为异步调用，任务已提交成功，请以requestId的值作为jobId参数调用同类目下GetAsyncJobResult接口查询任务执行状态和结果。

post.description: This topic describes the syntax and examples of the ChangeVideoSize operation for video aspect ratio transformation. The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=ChangeVideoSize and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

B.description: Required when FillType is set to `color`. Specifies the B value in the RGB color model.

CropType.description:
The cropping method. Valid values are `smart`, `fill`, and `cut`. The meanings are as follows:  

- `smart` (Intelligent cropping): Intelligently decides whether to pad, crop, or apply a combination of both based on the position of the main subject.  

- `fill` (Padding): Adjusts the aspect ratio based on the longer edge. Excess areas are filled with a blurred background, a specified color, or stretched.  

- `cut` (Cropping): Adjusts the aspect ratio based on the shorter edge. Excess areas are cropped out.

FillType.description:
Padding method. Valid values are `image`, `color`, and `stretch`. The meanings are as follows:  

- `image`: Fills with the content of the middle frame of the video, applying blur before padding.  

- `color`: Specifies a fill color using an RGB array, for example, red `[255,0,0]`.  

- `stretch`: Fills by stretching the video. This may cause severe distortion if the aspect ratio adjustment is large, so it is not recommended.

G.description: Required when FillType is set to `color`. Specifies the G value in the RGB color model.

Height.description: The height of the output video, in pixels. Value range: 32 to 2160.

R.description: Required when FillType is set to `color`. Specifies the R value in the RGB color model.

Tightness.description: The tightness of the cropping box. Value range: 0 to 1. A higher value results in more content being cropped. Default value: 0.6.

VideoUrl.description: The URL of the video. We recommend using an OSS link in the China (Shanghai) region. If your file is stored locally or in an OSS bucket outside the China (Shanghai) region, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).

Width.description: The width of the output video, in pixels. Valid values range from 32 to 2160.

Data.description: The returned data content. This data is obtained after the asynchronous task execution succeeds, by invoking the [GetAsyncJobResult](~~607824~~) API and performing JSON deserialization on its Result field.

VideoCoverUrl.description:
The URL of the output video thumbnail.  
> This URL is temporary and has a validity period of 30 minutes. After expiration, it will no longer be accessible. If you need to store the file for a long time or permanently, download and save it to your own OSS bucket or other storage space within 30 minutes.

VideoUrl.description:
The URL of the output video.  
> This URL is temporary and has a validity period of 30 minutes. After expiration, it will no longer be accessible. If you need to store the file for a long time or permanently, download and save it to your own OSS bucket or other storage space within 30 minutes.

Message.description: Message returned after submitting an asynchronous task.
Message.example: 该调用为异步调用，任务已提交成功，请以requestId的值作为jobId参数调用同类目下GetAsyncJobResult接口查询任务执行状态和结果。

post.description: This topic describes the syntax and examples of the EnhancePortraitVideo operation in the video production (videoenhan) category. The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=EnhancePortraitVideo and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

VideoUrl.description: The input video URL. We recommend using an OSS link in the China (Shanghai) region. For files stored locally or via OSS links in other regions, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).

Data.description: The returned result data. This data can be obtained only after the asynchronous task succeeds, by invoking the [GetAsyncJobResult](~~607824~~) API and performing JSON deserialization on its Result field.

VideoUrl.description:
The URL of the processed video.  
> This URL is temporary and has a validity period of 30 minutes. After expiration, it will no longer be accessible. If you need to store the file for a longer duration or permanently, access the URL and download the file within 30 minutes, then save it to your own OSS bucket or other storage space.

Message.description: The message returned after submitting an asynchronous task.
Message.example: 该调用为异步调用，任务已提交成功，请以requestId的值作为jobId参数调用同类目下GetAsyncJobResult接口查询任务执行状态和结果。

post.description: This topic describes the syntax and examples of the EnhanceVideoQuality operation. The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=EnhanceVideoQuality and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

Bitrate.description: The bitrate of the output video, measured in MB. The default value is 20 MB, with a valid range of `[8,200]`.

FrameRate.description: The frame rate of the output video. The default value is 50 fps, with a valid range of `[1,120]`.

HDRFormat.description: The HDR format of the output video. Only PQ and HLG formats are supported, with PQ as the default.

MaxIlluminance.description:
The maximum brightness of the output video, measured in nits.

- In **PQ** mode, this parameter is fixed at 600 nits, and any input value is invalid.
- In **HLG** mode, the valid range is 500 to 1000 nits, with a default value of 1000 nits.

OutPutHeight.description: The height of the output video. The default value is twice the input height, in pixels (px), with a valid range of `[180,4320]`.

OutPutWidth.description: The width of the output video. The default value is twice the input width, in pixels (px), with a valid range of `[180,7680]`.

VideoURL.description: The URL of the input video. We recommend using an OSS link from the China (Shanghai) region. For files stored locally or via OSS links in other regions, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).

Data.description: The content of the returned result data. This data is obtained only after the asynchronous task execution succeeds, by invoking the [GetAsyncJobResult](~~607824~~) API and performing JSON deserialization on its Result field.

VideoURL.description:
The URL of the processed video.
> This URL is temporary and has a validity period of 30 minutes. After expiration, the URL will no longer be accessible. To store the file permanently or for an extended duration, you must access the URL and download the file within 30 minutes, then save it to your own OSS bucket or another storage space.

Message.description: The message returned after submitting an asynchronous task.
Message.example: 该调用为异步调用，任务已提交成功，请以requestId的值作为jobId参数调用同类目下GetAsyncJobResult接口查询任务执行状态和结果。

post.description: This topic describes the syntax and examples of the EraseVideoLogo API. The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=EraseVideoLogo and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

Boxes.description: Position information of the logo area.

H.description: The ratio of the logo area height to the video height. Value range: 0 to 1.

W.description: The ratio of the logo area width to the video width. Value range: 0 to 1.

X.description: The ratio of the x-coordinate of the top-left corner of the logo area to the video width. Value range: 0 to 1.

Y.description: The ratio of the y-coordinate of the top-left corner of the logo area to the video height. Value range: 0 to 1.

VideoUrl.description: The video URL. We recommend using an OSS link in the China (Shanghai) region. For files stored locally or via OSS links in other regions, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).

Data.description: The content of the returned result data. This data is available only after the asynchronous task execution succeeds. You can obtain it by invoking the [GetAsyncJobResult](~~607824~~) API and performing JSON deserialization on its Result field.

VideoUrl.description:
The URL of the processed video.  
> This URL is temporary and has a validity period of 30 minutes. After expiration, the URL will no longer be accessible. If you need to store the file for a longer duration or permanently, download and save it to your own OSS bucket or other storage space within 30 minutes.

Message.description: The message returned after submitting an asynchronous task.
Message.example: 该调用为异步调用，任务已提交成功，请以requestId的值作为jobId参数调用同类目下GetAsyncJobResult接口查询任务执行状态和结果。

post.description: This topic describes the syntax and examples of the EraseVideoSubtitles operation. The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=EraseVideoSubtitles and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

BH.description: The ratio of the caption area height to the video height. The value ranges from 0 to 1.

BW.description: The ratio of the caption area width to the video width. The value ranges from 0 to 1.

BX.description: The x-coordinate of the top-left corner of the caption area divided by the video width. The value ranges from 0 to 1.

BY.description: The y-coordinate of the top-left corner of the caption area divided by the video height. The value ranges from 0 to 1.

VideoUrl.description: The video URL. We recommend using an OSS link in the China (Shanghai) region. For files stored locally or in an OSS bucket outside the China (Shanghai) region, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).

Data.description: The content of the returned result data. This data is obtained only after the asynchronous task execution succeeds, by invoking the [GetAsyncJobResult](~~607824~~) API and performing JSON deserialization on its Result field.

VideoUrl.description:
The URL of the processed video.
> This URL is temporary and has a validity period of 30 minutes. After expiration, the URL will no longer be accessible. To retain the file for a longer duration or permanently, you must access the URL and download the file within 30 minutes, then store it in your own OSS bucket or another storage space.

Message.description: The message returned after submitting an asynchronous task.
Message.example: 该调用为异步调用，任务已提交成功，请以requestId的值作为jobId参数调用同类目下GetAsyncJobResult接口查询任务执行状态和结果。

post.description: This topic describes the syntax and examples of the GenerateHumanAnimeStyleVideo operation in the video enhancement (videoenhan) category. The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=GenerateHumanAnimeStyleVideo and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

CartoonStyle.description:
The cartoon style. Valid values:  

- anime: Anime style  
- 3d: 3D effect  
- handdrawn: Hand-drawn style  
- sketch: Pencil sketch  
- artstyle: Artistic effect

VideoUrl.description: The video URL. We recommend using an OSS link in the China (Shanghai) region. For files stored locally or in an OSS bucket outside the China (Shanghai) region, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).

Data.description: The content of the returned result data. This data is obtained only after the asynchronous task succeeds, by invoking the [GetAsyncJobResult](~~607824~~) API and performing JSON deserialization on its Result field.

VideoUrl.description:
The URL of the processed video.  
> This URL is temporary and has a validity period of 30 minutes. After expiration, the URL becomes inaccessible. To retain the file permanently or for a longer duration, you must access the URL and download the file within 30 minutes, then store it in your own OSS bucket or another storage space.

Message.description: The message returned after submitting an asynchronous task.
Message.example: 该调用为异步调用，任务已提交成功，请以requestId的值作为jobId参数调用同类目下GetAsyncJobResult接口查询任务执行状态和结果。

post.description: This topic describes the syntax and examples of the general video generation operation GenerateVideo. The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=GenerateVideo and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

Duration.description:
The duration of the output video, in seconds. Default value: 20 seconds.  
The minimum duration is 5 seconds and the maximum is 60 seconds.

DurationAdaption.description: Adapt the output video duration automatically. Valid values: true or false. If set to true, the `Duration` setting does not take effect.

FileName.description: Name of the input file. For MP4 or MP3 video or audio files, the file extension may be omitted. For other formats, the file extension must be included.

FileUrl.description:
URL of the input file. We recommend using an OSS Link in the Shanghai Region. If your file is stored locally or in an OSS bucket outside the Shanghai Region, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).  
Input restrictions:  
- Image formats: JPG, PNG.  
- Image size: Each image must be larger than 30 KB and smaller than 100 MB.  
- Audio format: MP3.  
- Video formats: MP4, AVI, MKV, MOV.  
- Video size: No more than 1 GB.  
- Up to 5 video Materials are allowed, with a total duration not exceeding 3 minutes. Any portion beyond 3 minutes will be automatically truncated and discarded (the first 3 minutes are retained based on the input order). Up to 40 image Materials are allowed. Up to 1 audio Material is allowed.  
- The URL must not contain Chinese characters.

Type.description:
Type of the input file. Valid values include video, audio, and image.  
You can submit multiple types of Materials simultaneously (for example, video + image + audio, video + image, video + audio, or image + audio).

Height.description: The height of the output video, in pixels. Value range: 32 to 2160. If neither width nor height is set, the video is output at 750×750. If only one of them is set, the aspect ratio defaults to 1:1.

Mute.description:
Specifies whether the generated video is muted. Default value: false.  

> If no music Material is provided or the input video Material has no audio, the generated video will contain no music.

PuzzleEffect.description: Specifies whether to enable the Dynamic puzzle effect, which allows multiple video or image Materials to be displayed as a puzzle within a single shot. Default value: false.

Scene.description:
The scenario Type for video generation. Valid values:  

- costume: Costume scenario (default)  
- general: General scenario  
- keeporder: Force produce videos according to the input Material order

SmartEffect.description: Specifies whether to add Intelligent effects. The default value is true. Supported effects include filter interaction and Dynamic-to-static effects.

Style.description: The rhythm of the output video. Valid values: normal, fast, slow. Default value: normal.

TransitionStyle.description:
The transition style between shots. There are 15 styles available. If not specified, a style is randomly selected based on the `Style` parameter.  
Supported transition styles include: basic (none), slow (calm), fast (dynamic), normal (natural), ink (ink wash), glitch (glitch), shift (switch), mosaic (mosaic), shutter (shutter), zoom (scaling), mask (mask), brush (brush stroke), wind (wind dance), smog (smoke).

Width.description: The width of the output video, in pixels. Value range: 32 to 2160.

Data.description:
The content of the returned result data.  
This data is obtained only after the asynchronous task has Succeeded, by invoking the [GetAsyncJobResult](~~607824~~) API and performing JSON deserialization on its Result field.

VideoCoverUrl.description:
URL of the output video thumbnail.  
> This URL is temporary and has a Validity Period of 30 minutes. After expiration, the URL will no longer be accessible. To retain the file for a longer duration or permanently, you must access the URL and download the file within 30 minutes, then store it in your own OSS bucket or other storage Space.

VideoUrl.description:
URL of the output video.  
> This URL is temporary and has a Validity Period of 30 minutes. After expiration, the URL will no longer be accessible. To retain the file for a longer duration or permanently, you must access the URL and download the file within 30 minutes, then store it in your own OSS bucket or other storage Space.

Message.description: Message returned after submitting an asynchronous task.
Message.example: 该调用为异步调用，任务已提交成功，请以requestId的值作为jobId参数调用同类目下GetAsyncJobResult接口查询任务执行状态和结果。

post.description: This topic describes the syntax and examples of the InterpolateVideoFrame operation for video frame interpolation. The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=InterpolateVideoFrame and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

Bitrate.description: The bitrate of the output video, in Mbps. The default value is 20 Mbps, and the valid range is `[8,200]`.

FrameRate.description: The frame rate of the output video. The default value is 50, and the valid range is `[1,120]`.

VideoURL.description: The URL of the input video. We recommend using an OSS link in the China (Shanghai) region. For files stored locally or in an OSS bucket outside the China (Shanghai) region, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).

Data.description: The content of the returned result data. This data is available only after the asynchronous task has succeeded. You can obtain it by invoking the [GetAsyncJobResult](~~607824~~) API and performing JSON deserialization on its Result field.

VideoURL.description:
The URL of the processed video.
> This URL is temporary and valid for 30 minutes. After expiration, the URL becomes inaccessible. If you need to store the file permanently or for a longer duration, you must access the URL and download the file within 30 minutes, then save it to your own OSS bucket or another storage space.

Message.description: The message returned after submitting an asynchronous task.
Message.example: 该调用为异步调用，任务已提交成功，请以requestId的值作为jobId参数调用同类目下GetAsyncJobResult接口查询任务执行状态和结果。

post.description: Video super-resolution. The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=SuperResolveVideo and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

BitRate.description: The output video bitrate, in Mbps. The default value is 10 Mbps. Valid values range from 1 to 20.

VideoUrl.description: The input video URL. We recommend using an OSS link in the China (Shanghai) region. For files stored locally or in an OSS bucket outside the China (Shanghai) region, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).

Data.description: The returned result data. This data is available only after the asynchronous task succeeds. You can obtain it by invoking the [GetAsyncJobResult](~~607824~~) API and performing JSON deserialization on its Result field.

VideoUrl.description:
The URL of the processed output video.
> This URL is temporary and has a validity period of 30 minutes. After expiration, the URL becomes inaccessible. To retain the file permanently or for an extended duration, you must access the URL within 30 minutes and download the file to your own OSS bucket or other storage space.

Message.description: The message returned after submitting an asynchronous task.
Message.example: 该调用为异步调用，任务已提交成功，请以requestId的值作为jobId参数调用同类目下GetAsyncJobResult接口查询任务执行状态和结果。
